hero.subtitle: Report. Vote. Confirm. Watch your neighborhood transform through the power of collective action.
hero.tagline: Your neighborhood. Your city. Your voice.

0.main: Vinyl fair at the square on Saturday.
0.detail: That record you've been looking for months was there, half price. But the info never reaches you.

1.main: Someone found an ID on the sidewalk.
1.detail: Tried to return it. Didn't know who to. Left it at a shop counter. The owner never found out.

2.detail: You found out a day later. You were at risk.

3.main: The Instagram page posted about the robbery.
3.detail: Three days later. No exact location, no useful details. Mixed with ads and memes. Those who needed the alert had already passed through the same spot.

4.main: 4-hour traffic jam on the main avenue.
4.detail: It was a serious accident. If you'd known, you would have taken another route. The info arrived too late.

5.main: Water leaking on the street for days.
5.detail: The neighborhood thought the fix would be quick. But nobody notified the authorities.

howItWorks.act2Title1: Everything that matters to your community
howItWorks.act2Body1: Crimes with no record. Events with no audience.
howItWorks.act2Body1b: Calls for help with no answer. Information with no destination.
howItWorks.act2Body2: It's not that people don't care.
howItWorks.act3Body1: A social network that exists for one single reason:
howItWorks.act3Body1Bold: to connect you with the people next door.
howItWorks.act3Body2: About the things that truly matter to you.

features.title: Everything your community
features.subtitle: Not a social network of likes and selfies. This is where real things happen between real people.

0.body: 30 neighbors confirmed in minutes. The entire street knew.

1.text: Organic fair at the park Saturday
1.body: The producer announces, the community shows up.

2.body: 20 confirmations. Not a complaint — it's evidence.

3.body: Recommendations from people who walk the same sidewalk.

4.body: Your neighbors recommend, local business thrives.

features.punchline1: A social network doesn't have to be about
features.punchline2: Sometimes, it just needs to be about
features.punchline2Accent: your street, your neighborhood, your city. What's around you.

community.body: Everything happening around you, in your neighborhood, in your city — you'll know. Every post is validated by people who live there. It's not a like — it's a real confirmation. When many neighbors say it's relevant,

0.sub: The community verifies. Without confirmation, posts lose reach.

1.sub: Only what happens around you shows up for you.

2.sub: Who posted, who confirmed. Everything visible.

0.text: Attempted theft on Haddock Lobo Street

1.text: Free concert at Ibirapuera Park today 6pm

3.text: Traffic light out at Faria Lima intersection

6.text: Anyone recommend a pediatrician around here?

community.closing1: From your block to the entire city. Safety, culture, solidarity, infrastructure, local business. Everything happening around you.
community.closing2: You'll never be the last to know again.

ctaFooter.narrative1: Social networks connect you with the world.
ctaFooter.narrative3Bold: It's for those who care about where they live.
ctaFooter.narrative4: We're opening community by community. Neighborhood by neighborhood.
ctaFooter.narrative5Accent: Be the first. Kick it off.
ctaFooter.ctaBody: Download the app and be the one to activate your community.

contato.title: Contact
contato.subtitle: Choose the most appropriate channel for your inquiry. Each channel has a specific response time.

0.title: General email
0.description: For general questions, suggestions, and partnerships.

1.title: Privacy and personal data
1.description: To exercise your rights under data protection law: access, correction, deletion, or data portability.
1.response: We respond within 15 business days as required by law.

2.title: Data Protection Officer (DPO)
2.description: Direct channel to our Data Protection Officer, as required by data protection regulations.

3.title: Legal
3.description: For legal matters, formal notices, and regulatory affairs.

4.title: Reports and security
4.description: To report security vulnerabilities, platform abuse, or content that violates our Terms of Service.

contato.formSubtitle: Prefer to send your message directly? Fill out the form below.
contato.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you soon at the email provided.
contato.emergencyBody: {appName} is not an emergency service. In situations involving risk to life or safety, contact the appropriate services directly:

0.1: City hall aware — pothole crew dispatched

2.1: Civil defense monitoring — city hall aware

4.1: Water company dispatched — crew on the way

6.1: Traffic dept notified — signage in progress

3.1: Traffic dept notified — inspection on site

5.1: City hall aware — emergency cleanup dispatched

3.1: Traffic dept notified — traffic study started

4.1: City hall aware — project in progress

5.1: City hall aware — maintenance crew dispatched

7.1: City hall aware — feasibility under review

1.1: Already resolved — crew confirmed repair on site

2.1: Already resolved — issue not found on site

3.1: Duplicate — already reported by another citizen

7.1: Not relevant — regular collection already scheduled

0.1: False alarm — no incident at location

2.1: False alarm — inspection found no risk

3.1: Not relevant — existing signage in place

4.1: Risk not confirmed — tree evaluated and safe

termos.intro: Welcome to {appName}. These Terms of Use govern the access to and use of the {appName} platform, operated by {appName} Tecnologia Ltda., registered under CNPJ No. [to be defined], headquartered at [to be defined] (the "Company", "we", or "our").

0.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
0.summary: By using the platform, you agree to these terms.

content.0: By accessing or using the {appName} platform (the "Platform"), including the mobile application and website, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use (the "Terms"). If you do not agree to any part of these Terms, you must not use the Platform.
content.1: We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated through the Platform or via email. Your continued use of the Platform following any modification constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

1.title: 2. Description of Service
1.summary: What the service is and what it is not (not an emergency service).

content.0: {appName} is a hyperlocal communication platform that enables users to share, verify, and access information relevant to the community in which they reside. The Platform includes, but is not limited to, features for publishing alerts, events, recommendations, requests for assistance, and infrastructure reports.
content.1: {appName} is not an emergency service. In situations involving risk to life or safety, please contact the appropriate emergency services directly.

2.title: 3. Registration and Account
2.summary: Your information must be accurate and your account is your responsibility.

content.0: To use certain features of the Platform, you are required to create an account. By registering, you represent and warrant that:
content.2: Each account is linked to a verified residential address. {appName} may request proof of residence at any time to ensure the integrity of the geolocation system.
content.3: You are solely responsible for all activities conducted through your account. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any unauthorized use.

3.title: 4. Acceptable Use and Conduct
3.summary: What you may and may not do on the platform.

content.0: By using the Platform, you agree to:
content.2: {appName} reserves the right to remove content, suspend, or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, at any time and without prior notice.

4.title: 5. User Content
4.summary: You own what you post, but you grant us a license to display it.

content.0: By publishing content on the Platform ("User Content"), you:
content.2: The collective verification system is a community validation mechanism. It indicates the degree of confirmation by other users but does not constitute an absolute guarantee of veracity.

5.title: 6. Verification System
5.summary: The system helps, but does not guarantee absolute accuracy.

content.0: {appName} employs a collective verification system through which users may confirm or dispute published information. This system:
content.2: {appName} does not warrant that all community-verified information is accurate. You should exercise your own judgment when relying on information from the Platform.

6.title: 7. Intellectual Property
6.summary: The brand and code belong to us.

content.0: The Platform, including its design, source code, trademarks, logos, text, and all other elements, is protected by intellectual property laws and belongs to {appName} or its licensors.
content.1: Nothing in these Terms grants you any right to the intellectual property of {appName}, except the limited right to use the Platform as provided herein.

7.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
7.summary: The platform is provided as is.

content.0: The Platform is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis, without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
content.1: {appName} does not warrant that: (a) the Platform will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free; (b) the results obtained through the Platform will be accurate or reliable; (c) any information published by users will be truthful, complete, or current.

8.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
8.summary: We are not liable for indirect damages.

content.0: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, {appName}, its directors, employees, partners, and agents shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, use, or other intangible losses, arising from:

9.title: 10. Indemnification
9.summary: You indemnify us if your use of the platform causes issues.

content.0: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless {appName}, its directors, employees, partners, and agents from and against any and all claims, demands, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including attorneys' fees) arising from: (a) your use of the Platform; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) your violation of the rights of any third party; (d) any User Content published by you.

10.title: 11. Termination
10.summary: You may leave at any time. We may also terminate your account.

content.0: You may terminate your account at any time through the Platform settings. {appName} may suspend or terminate your account and access to the Platform, in whole or in part, at any time, for any reason, including violation of these Terms.
content.1: Upon termination, your right to use the Platform shall cease immediately. The provisions relating to intellectual property, disclaimer of warranties, limitation of liability, and indemnification shall survive termination.

content.0: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be submitted to the courts of the jurisdiction where {appName} is headquartered, with express waiver of any other forum, however privileged.

12.title: 13. General Provisions
12.summary: If one clause is invalidated, the remaining provisions continue in effect.

content.0: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect. The failure of {appName} to exercise or enforce any right or provision of these Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision.
content.1: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and {appName} with respect to the use of the Platform and supersede all prior agreements.

13.title: 14. Contact
13.summary: How to reach us for legal inquiries.

content.0: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, please contact us through our Contact page or via email at legal@infra.app.

privacidade.introParagraph: This Privacy Policy describes how {appName} Tecnologia Ltda., registered under CNPJ No. [to be defined], headquartered at [to be defined] (“{appName}”, “Company”, “we”, or “our”), processes the personal data of users of the {appName} platform.

0.title: 1. Introduction
0.summary: This policy explains how we handle your personal data.

content.0: Your privacy is fundamental to {appName}. This Privacy Policy (“Policy”) describes how we collect, use, store, share, and protect your personal information when you use our platform, including the mobile application and website (“Platform”).
content.1: This Policy complies with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD) (Law No. 13,709/2018), the Brazilian Civil Rights Framework for the Internet (Law No. 12,965/2014), and other applicable regulations.
content.2: By using the Platform, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to the practices described in this Policy.

1.title: 2. Personal Data We Collect
1.summary: We collect data you provide, automatically collected data, and third-party data.

content.0: We collect different categories of personal data, as described below:
content.1:
2.1. Data provided by you:
• Full name and display name
• Email address
• Phone number
• Residential address (for geolocation verification)
• Profile photo (optional)
• Content you publish, including text, images, and verifications
content.2:
2.2. Automatically collected data:
• IP address and connection information
• Device type, operating system, and browser
• Geolocation data (with your explicit consent)
• Platform usage data (pages accessed, features used, session duration)
• Device identifiers
• Cookies and similar technologies
content.3:
2.3. Third-party data:
• Information from authentication services, if you choose social login (Google, Apple)
• Address verification data through validation partners

2.title: 3. Purposes of Data Processing
2.summary: We use your data to operate the platform and improve your experience.

content.0: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
content.1:
• Create and manage your account on the Platform
• Verify your residential address to ensure the integrity of the hyperlocal system
• Display relevant content based on your location
• Operate the collective verification system
• Send notifications about relevant activities in your area
• Improve and personalize the Platform experience
• Ensure Platform security and prevent fraud
• Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
• Generate aggregated and anonymized statistical and analytical data
• Communicate updates, Platform changes, and relevant information

3.title: 4. Legal Basis for Data Processing
3.summary: All data processing is grounded in the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD).

content.0: The processing of your personal data is based on the following legal grounds provided by the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD):
content.1:
• Consent (Art. 7, I): for collection of geolocation data and sending optional communications
• Performance of contract (Art. 7, V): for provision of Platform services
• Legitimate interest (Art. 7, IX): for Platform improvement, security, and fraud prevention
• Compliance with legal obligation (Art. 7, II): to meet legal and regulatory requirements
• Credit protection and regular exercise of rights (Art. 7, VI and X): when applicable

4.title: 5. Data Sharing
4.summary: We do not sell your data. We share it only when necessary.

content.0: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information in the following circumstances:
content.1: 5.1. With other users: your display name, profile photo, and published content are visible to other users in your area, according to Platform settings.
content.2: 5.2. With service providers: we share data with third parties that assist us in operating the Platform (hosting, analytics, address verification, notification delivery), under contracts that ensure data protection.
content.3: 5.3. By legal obligation: we may disclose data when required by law, court order, or legal proceedings.
content.4: 5.4. In the event of corporate reorganization: in the event of a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, data may be transferred, with the guarantees of this Policy maintained.
content.5: 5.5. Aggregated and anonymized data: we may share statistical data that does not individually identify users.

5.title: 6. Storage and Security
5.summary: Your data is stored on secure, encrypted servers.

content.0: Your personal data is stored on secure servers located in Brazil and/or in data centers that ensure adequate levels of protection, in compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD).
content.1: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction, including:
content.2:
• Data encryption in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest
• Role-based access control (RBAC)
• Continuous security monitoring
• Regular security audits
• Encrypted and redundant backups
• Data retention policies
content.3: Despite our efforts, no system is completely secure. If we identify a data breach, we will notify affected users and the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD) within the legal timeframes.

6.title: 7. Data Retention
6.summary: We keep your data for as long as necessary, then anonymize it.

content.0: Your personal data is retained for the period necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law.
content.1: After the closure of your account, we will retain certain data for the period necessary to: (a) comply with legal obligations; (b) resolve disputes; (c) enforce our agreements. Usage data and logs will be anonymized after 24 months.

7.title: 8. Your Rights
7.summary: You can access, correct, delete, and port your data.

content.0: In compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD), you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
content.1:
• Confirmation of the existence of data processing
• Access to personal data
• Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data
• Anonymization, blocking, or deletion of unnecessary or excessive data
• Data portability to another provider
• Deletion of data processed based on consent
• Information about data sharing with third parties
• Information about the possibility of not providing consent and its consequences
• Revocation of consent
content.2: To exercise your rights, contact us through the Contact page or by email at privacidade@infra.app. We will respond to your request within 15 business days.

8.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
8.summary: We use cookies for functionality and analytics, not for advertising.

content.0: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
content.1:
• Keep your session active and authenticated
• Remember your preferences and settings
• Understand how you use the Platform (analytics)
• Improve performance and user experience
content.2: You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect Platform functionality.
content.3: We do not use cookies for third-party advertising tracking.

9.title: 10. Privacy of Minors
9.summary: The platform is not intended for persons under 18 years of age.

content.0: The Platform is not intended for persons under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect personal data from minors under 18 without the consent of a legal guardian. If we identify that we have collected data from a minor without proper consent, we will take steps to delete such information.

10.title: 11. International Data Transfer
10.summary: Data may be processed outside Brazil with adequate protection.

content.0: Your data may be processed by service providers located outside Brazil. In such cases, we ensure that the transfer complies with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD), through standard contractual clauses or other adequate safeguards provided by law.

11.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
11.summary: We will notify you when the policy changes.

content.0: We may update this Policy periodically. Significant changes will be communicated through the Platform or by email before they take effect. We recommend that you review this Policy regularly.
content.1: The date of the last update is always indicated at the top of this page.

12.title: 13. Data Protection Officer (DPO)
12.summary: We have a Data Protection Officer you can contact.

content.0: In compliance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD), {appName} has appointed a Data Protection Officer (DPO), who can be contacted at dpo@infra.app to address matters related to personal data protection.

13.title: 14. Contact
13.summary: How to reach us for privacy matters.

content.0: For matters related to this Privacy Policy, please contact:
content.1:
{appName} Tecnologia Ltda.
Email: privacidade@infra.app
Data Protection Officer (DPO): dpo@infra.app
Contact page: /contato

comoFunciona.heroSubtitle: Neighborhood Instagram pages post late, without verification, and the algorithm decides who sees it. WhatsApp groups drown everything in noise. The information that matters keeps getting lost — and your community stays disconnected.
comoFunciona.problemsTitle: Everything that matters to your community

0.title: You follow the neighborhood Instagram page.
0.body: It posts about yesterday's robbery — but only tomorrow. Mixed with restaurant ads and meme reposts. No exact location, no useful details, no verification.
0.punchline: By the time the info arrives, it's too late.

1.title: The condo group has 847 unread messages.
1.body: Someone asked for help with a leak. The message was buried by political chain messages, good morning stickers, and a 7-minute audio complaining about the building manager.

2.title: The neighborhood page decides what's news.
2.body: An admin chooses what to post. The algorithm chooses who sees it. Your next-door neighbor doesn't see what happened on their street — but sees a reel from a neighborhood they've never visited.
2.punchline: Local information became hostage to the algorithm.

3.title: Local businesses stay invisible.
3.body: The artisan bakery opened on the corner. Posted on Instagram, reached 40 people — most don't even live in the neighborhood. The algorithm prioritized something else. The neighbors next door never saw it.
3.punchline: Local information wasn't made to compete with the global feed.

4.title: Three robberies in the same week. Zero records.
4.body: The victims told their stories. Lasted 24 hours and vanished. Nobody consolidated, nobody mapped, nobody alerted the next street over. Each case became an isolated story.
4.punchline: Without collective record, the pattern never appears.

5.title: Your neighbor needs help. You don't even know who she is.
5.body: She's lived upstairs for 3 years. Needs someone to pick up medication. Has no one to ask — because there's no channel where neighbors truly connect.
5.punchline: We live close, yet far apart.

comoFunciona.transitionLine1: It's not that people don't care.

0.title: Someone posts.
0.body: Any resident can create a post about what's happening around them. Safety, events, requests for help, local business, infrastructure — everything.
0.detail: No bureaucratic forms. No confusing categories. Straight to the point.

1.title: The neighborhood sees.
1.body: The post only appears to people who live nearby. It's not a global feed — it's about your neighborhood, your street, what happens around you.
1.detail: The reach adapts to the post type. Safety alerts cover more area. Restaurant recommendations, less.

2.title: The community confirms.
2.body: Neighbors verify if it's real. It's not a like — it's a confirmation. When many neighbors say it's relevant, it's not opinion.

3.title: The information arrives.
3.body: In less than 5 minutes, those who need to know, know. Safety alerts, opportunities, requests for help — everything circulates fast.
3.detail: With credibility. Because it was verified by people who live there.

0.before: Instagram page posts the robbery 2 days later.
0.after: Verified alert in 3 minutes, 40 neighbors confirm.

1.before: Fair at the park — Instagram post reaches 5% of the neighborhood.
1.after: Everyone who lives nearby finds out automatically.

2.before: Complaint in the group — buried in 30 seconds.

3.before: Local business — the algorithm decides who sees.
3.after: 89 neighbors who live nearby know on day one.

comoFunciona.ctaLine1: Right information. Right people. Right time.

oQueAcontece.heroSubtitle: Safety, culture, solidarity, infrastructure, local business. From your block to the entire city — you'll never be the last to know again.

0.title: Know first. Stay safer.
0.body: Safety alerts verified by neighbors in real time. Robberies, thefts, suspicious activity — information arrives in minutes, not days. You know what's happening around you before leaving home.

examples.0: Attempted theft on Haddock Lobo Street — 43 confirmations
examples.1: Robbery on Augusta Street — community alerted in 3 min
examples.2: Suspicious car circling the block — 12 neighbors confirm

1.title: What happens nearby reaches you.
1.body: Fairs, concerts, workshops, community events. Everything happening in your neighborhood appears for those who live close. The right event finds the right audience — by proximity, not by algorithm.

examples.0: Organic fair at the park — Saturday 9am
examples.1: Free concert at Ibirapuera today at 6pm
examples.2: Ceramics workshop at the cultural center — limited spots

2.title: When it's urgent, every minute counts.
2.body: Requests for help that reach those who can truly help — people who live nearby. Blood donation, lost pet, elderly person needing assistance. Proximity turns intention into action.

examples.0: Need O- blood donation — hospital 2km away
examples.1: Lost dog — golden, blue collar, seen in Pinheiros
examples.2: Elderly neighbor needs a ride to appointment tomorrow

3.title: It's not a complaint. It's evidence.
3.body: Potholes, broken traffic lights, leaks, damaged sidewalks. When dozens of residents confirm the same problem, it's not opinion — it's data. And data drives action.

examples.0: Huge pothole on Flores Street — 67 confirmations
examples.1: Traffic light out for 3 days at intersection — 45 reports
examples.2: Water leak at the corner — 28 neighbors confirm

4.title: Your neighbors recommend, local business thrives.
4.body: Bakeries, restaurants, services, promotions. Local businesses gain real visibility to people who can actually visit. A neighbor's recommendation is worth more than an ad.

examples.0: New bakery with artisan bread on the corner — 89 likes
examples.2: Japanese restaurant opened in Vila Madalena

5.title: Recommendations from people who walk the same sidewalk.
5.body: Electrician, pediatrician, pet shop, gym. When the recommendation comes from someone who lives next door, the trust is different. Simple questions with answers from people who truly know the neighborhood.

examples.1: What's the best gym in the area?

6.title: Reaches those nearby who can return it.
6.body: Documents, wallets, found items. Instead of sitting on a counter waiting, the information goes directly to people in the area — where the chance of finding the owner is real.

examples.0: Found an ID on Paulista Ave — pick up at café X
examples.2: Keys found on the park bench — with red keychain

7.title: The entire street knows in minutes.
7.body: Loose animals, power outages, flooding, road closures. Information that affects those who live there arrives fast and verified. It's not panic — it's collective awareness.

examples.0: Aggressive dog loose in Vila Madalena — 56 alerts
examples.1: Power outage on the block — estimated return 2h
examples.2: Flooding on Consolação Street — avoid the stretch

oQueAcontece.closingLine1: A social network doesn't have to be about the entire world.
oQueAcontece.closingLine2: Sometimes, it just needs to be about

verificacao.heroSubtitle: The verification system of {appName} is built on a simple premise: truth is stronger when it comes from many. Not from an algorithm — from real people who live there.

0.title: Someone reports
0.body: A resident sees something happening in the neighborhood — a robbery, a pothole, a new fair, a request for help. They create a post in seconds.
0.detail: No bureaucratic forms. No confusing categories. Straight to the point: what happened, where, when.

1.title: Neighbors are notified
1.body: The post automatically appears to those who live nearby. It's not a global feed — it's hyperlocal. Only relevant people see it.
1.detail: The reach depends on the post type. A safety alert covers more area. A restaurant recommendation, less.

2.title: The community verifies
2.body: Each neighbor can confirm: "I saw it too", "it's happening", "it's real". It's not a like — it's a statement of truth.
2.detail: Each confirmation carries the weight of a real person, with a real address, who lives there. You can't create fake accounts for neighborhoods where you don't live.

3.title: Trust grows
3.body: With 5 confirmations, the post gains prominence. With 20, it's promoted to adjacent neighborhoods. With 40+, it becomes verified evidence.
3.detail: Credibility doesn't come from a company — it comes from your community. The more neighbors confirm, the stronger the information.

4.title: Action happens
4.body: Verified information drives action. Neighbors protect themselves, events fill up, local business thrives, infrastructure problems gain evidence to be resolved.
4.detail: It's not a complaint platform. It's a transformation platform — driven by the community, for the community.

0.title: Less misinformation
0.body: The community verifies. Posts without confirmation automatically lose reach. The more neighbors validate, the more visible the information becomes.
0.detail: On traditional networks, the algorithm prioritizes engagement — regardless of truthfulness. Here, reach is proportional to real verifications from real people.

1.title: No noise
1.body: Only what happens around you shows up for you. No national politics, no celebrities, no ads. Your feed is your neighborhood.
1.detail: The {appName} feed is geographically limited by design. You see what matters to those who live near you. Nothing more, nothing less.

2.title: No black box
2.body: Who posted, who confirmed, how many verifications. Everything visible. No hidden algorithm deciding what you see.
2.detail: Each post shows exactly how many people confirmed, from which neighborhoods, and when. Total transparency. You trust because you can verify.

3.title: No toxic anonymity
3.body: Each user is linked to their real address. You can't create fake accounts for neighborhoods where you don't live.
3.detail: This doesn't mean your name appears publicly. It means the system knows you're real and that you live where you say you live. Accountability with privacy.
